mapper.select: SELECT * FROM devices WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT d.id, d.device_name AS deviceName, d.nickname, d.product_id AS productId, p.product_key AS productKey, p.name AS productName, d.tenant_id AS tenantId, d.project_id AS projectId, d.status, d.online_status AS onlineStatus FROM devices d LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = d.product_id WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM devices WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
